channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Cape Verde vs Saudi Arabia: Free Streams & TV Channels as FIFA World Cup 2026 minnows target historic knockout spot
item.description: Here's how to watch Cape Verde vs Saudi Arabia for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as the Group H debutants aim to reach the last-32.

item.title: How to watch DR Congo vs Uzbekistan: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Leopards hunt historic win
item.description: Here's how to watch DR Congo vs Uzbekistan for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as The Leopards aim to reach the knockout stage for the first time.

item.title: SoftBank’s CEO isn’t the only one with questions about Elon Musk’s orbital data center hype
item.description: Not everyone is buying Elon Musk’s vision for orbital data centers.

item.title: How to watch Colombia vs Portugal: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Cristiano Ronaldo targets more goals at FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Colombia vs Portugal for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as Cristiano Ronaldo's side look to snatch top spot in Group K.

item.title: I spent a week watching and playing these 3 intriguing horror titles — here's my verdict on which ones are worth your time
item.description: The Terror: Devil in Silver, Mean Creek, and The Sinking City caught my eye this week. But are they worth your time?

item.title: Here's your daily reminder that you don't own digital content
item.description: People in Europe will soon lose access to Studio Canal movies they paid for on the PlayStation Store.

item.title: Claude Code turned every engineer into three. Now companies need more product thinkers
item.description: Anthropic recently told its growth team to hire more product managers, not fewer. The reason, as reported in industry coverage, was that Claude Code had quietly turned its engineering org into a team that ships at roughly three times its actual headcount, and the bottleneck moved from the integrated development environment (IDE) to the people deciding what to build.That detail is easy to miss in the noise of every AI productivity claim. It is also the structural shift the rest of the industry is now living through. The bottleneck in software is no longer typing. It is deciding what to type. An...

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.
